heading: Set Transaction Lifetime
body:
Set the maximum lifetime of [multi-document transactions](manual/core/transactions). This option corresponds to modifying the
[transactionLifetimeLimitSeconds](manual/reference/parameters) parameter via the
[setParameter](manual/reference/command/setParameter) command for each mongod in the cluster.

> **Important:** You can't set the transaction lifetime to less than one second.

The default transaction lifetime for clusters is 60 seconds.
